description: Classifications for product-code NotSupportedException paths that are not pure .NET stream mechanics.

mechanicalUnsupported.rationale: System.IO.Stream requires members such as Length, Position, Seek, SetLength, Read, or Write even for one-way filter streams.
Private stream adapter exposes only the operations required by the PDF writer.
Nested decoder stream exposes only read operations required by CCITT decoding.

semanticUnsupported.statementContains: not yet supported in this PdfBox.Net tools port
semanticUnsupported.rationale: Tool entry points are intentionally guarded until the corresponding model/runtime features reach parity.
Apache PDFBox CryptFilter supports Identity and throws for other named crypt filters through the same semantic path.
Apache PDFBox DCTFilter.encode throws UnsupportedOperationException and directs callers to JPEGFactory.
Apache PDFBox COSArrayList rejects mutations on filtered list views.
Apache PDFBox PDFunctionTypeIdentity.getFunctionType throws because the identity function has no COS function type.
Apache PDFBox Type 4 execution throws UnsupportedOperationException for unknown operators or names.
Apache PDFBox PDImmutableRectangle mutators throw UnsupportedOperationException.
Public-key encryption needs CMS recipient support and a dependency boundary decision before it can match Apache PDFBox.
Standard decryption is implemented; encryption writing requires the document protection API and encrypted save flow.

semanticUnsupported.statementContains: Type 3 fonts do not use FontBox fonts

semanticUnsupported.rationale: Apache PDFBox PDJPXColorSpace throws for drawing/COS object paths.

semanticUnsupported.statementContains: Pattern color space cannot be converted
semanticUnsupported.rationale: Pattern color spaces without an underlying color space cannot be converted directly to RGB.
High-bit-depth sampled image rendering remains part of the runtime parity roadmap.

semanticUnsupported.statementContains: Signature fields don't support setting the value as String
semanticUnsupported.rationale: Apache PDFBox PDSignatureField.setValue(String) always throws; callers must set a PDSignature value.
